case_title: MICHELLE PARK VS. T-MOBILE USA INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARK, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY PARK, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT T-MOBILE USA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
